title: Candidate Visa Verification Tools: 2026 Platform Comparison
description: Comprehensive review of 2026 Candidate Visa Verification Tools, helping staffing agencies verify candidate visa status.
content:
Candidate Visa Verification Overview

Visa verification is important for staffing agencies to verify candidate work authorization. Staffing agencies need visa verification tools including visa check, work authorization, immigration compliance. Candidate visa verification tools help agencies achieve visa check, work authorization verification, immigration compliance.

Visa Verification Platform Reviews

Sterling Visa Verification

Sterling provides comprehensive visa verification services. Visa check features check candidate visa status. Work authorization features verify work authorization. Immigration compliance features verify immigration compliance.

Selection Recommendations

Staffing agencies selecting candidate visa verification tools should focus on visa check, work authorization verification, immigration compliance, and cost structure.
author: Visa Verification Research Institute
